message:
feat(glamour): add LRU cache limit to StyleCache (bd-244a)

Replace unbounded Vec storage with LRU-ordered cache:
- Add DEFAULT_STYLE_CACHE_CAPACITY constant (256 entries)
- Add with_capacity() constructor for custom limits
- Add capacity() getter method
- Implement LRU eviction: recently accessed items move to end,
  oldest items evicted from front when at capacity
- Add comprehensive tests for eviction behavior and access order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
